title: Asana supported fields
excerpt:
I believe the Asana integration is at its bare minimum, these are the supported Asana fields in Monday: 

Name
Assignee
Completed
Notes
Due date
Parent name

posts.author: obregonmar (Marianne)
posts.cookedHtml:
I believe the Asana integration is at its bare minimum, these are the supported Asana fields in Monday:

  • Name
  • Assignee
  • Completed
  • Notes
  • Due date
  • Parent name
    But some only sync one way, and they don’t work with the status nor drop down column, which I believe are essential to any workflow on monday.com

Is there an expected date when we will be able to have a more complete integration?

posts.author: TheOtherPM (Paul McGregor)
posts.cookedHtml: What’s your reason for using both Asana and Monday? Curious as they seem to serve the same purpose.

posts.author: obregonmar (Marianne)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey! good question! maybe i should’ve clarified! One of our sales teams manages the commercial relationships and deals of a company that is not part of our group and they have their workflow in Asana. We are trying to make both platforms together so that the same workflow exists both in their Asana account and our Monday account in order to make the whole process more efficient

posts.author: kmims (Kayla Mims)
posts.cookedHtml:
Nearly 2 years later, also curious if/when this will be updated!
Primarily syncing the status columns would be extremely productive.
